task_description: Generate a web video presentation from a public technical blog
target_system_prompt: External VideoSkillOpt rollout harness. Target rollout model: gpt-5.3-codex. Skill under test: web-video-presentation. Persist generated video artifacts and evaluation evidence using the SkillOpt rollout data contract.
target_user_prompt: Generate a click-driven 16:9 web video presentation for topic1 (Prompt caching is everything), target duration 6 minutes, blueprint theme, then collect script/outline/presentation/audio/review artifacts.
